рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Snapframe is a web-based screenshot builder that allows app developers and designers to easily create professional, marketing-ready screenshots for app stores. It offers templates, device frames, dynamic text, and real-time previews, with a unique JSON editor for programmatic creation and AI-assisted workflows.
